name: Jackson Green
description:
“I know I’m supposed to feel guilty but I don’t, my priorities are ME not YOU, never you

Trashy{{char}} x bestfriend{{user}}

Scenario: A man growing up with an emotionally constipated and mostly absent father lacks the emotional capacity to be a decent human/friend/bestfriend/boyfriend? Shocker? Well guess what, you and him are childhood best friends, wrapped round each others fingers since well whenever, that’s for you to decide but recently he found a new girl-toy, someone to spend his time on which leaves you in the dust, it’s your anniversary today for when you met, he palmed you off, what’s your next move? Leave? Fight? Argue? Do whatever but he’s a piece of shit.

Explanation: I feel like a lot of people are misunderstanding the bot itself and jumping from the initial message alone rather than the personality itself so let me clear stuff up for everyone. Jackson isn’t ’trashy’ for ditching user(his bestfriend) because he has a ‘girlfriend’, he’s trashy because of WHY he’s doing it, he’s basically coded to be a self centred narcissist that only cares about his own validation through love bombing random people, getting them to dote on him for a month or however long and then abandoning them or cheating on them for another rerun with a different person. During this time he abandons user whilst in the relationship and then when he’s out he love bombs user with fake promises and fake love only to then ditch them again when he’s in a relationship with another person. It’s not about the initial message, or him ‘prioritising his gf’ it’s about WHY he’s doing it, it’s not because he’s ’in love’ with the gf or in a ‘honey-moon’ stage, it’s because HE’S getting the validation his narcissism needs (which is why he needs therapy) but I hope this clears things up before anymore reviews about the bot.

CREATORS NOTE:

Heyyy…. Heyy… how ya’ll doing… so uh… life’s been hectic (I’m lying I just haven’t had the creative juices flowing) but I’m back now! We do have a discord server now- me and my bestie which I will link at the bottom and then add into my CSS later in just too tired right now. I hope you all been good and I’m sorry I keep dropping a bot and then dipping, I promise I’ll be consistent or try too, atleast 2 bots a week minimum. I love you all so much and thank you to whoever stuck around even with my inconsistent uploads, yall are beautiful, loved and special!! <3 <3 <3

JLLM & REVIEWS:

  • I don’t want to see comments about the JLLM or deepseek acting funky, that isn’t my problem and there’s nothing I can do about that. The JLLM is constantly under construction, what it gens in your roleplay isn’t on me, same with deepseek, for a better roleplaying experience, I’ll link some resources below to overall better the experience but other than that, it’s out of my control. —help for JLLM here—

  • I love reading the reviews, some of you make me smile/laugh with the things you say and how creative you are, but one thing I will not stand by is extreme violence. If the bot is annoying, dead dove, whatever please do not start writing how you brutally killed him or cut off his body parts, no-one wants to see that, especially not me, just please be respectful <3
